'''Pato Ado''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] ecologist and [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologist]] who met [[Meetra Surik]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. He had spent a great deal of time studying the native plants and animals, and so was desperate to return to his herd on [[Telos IV|Telos]] to aid in the [[Telosian Restoration Project|restoration project there]]. While he waited for a ship to take him to Telos, he took up [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] as a hobby. At first many opponents were willing to play against him, however as his skill improved, fewer and fewer individuals wished to play, so he began offering his rare and expensive [[Armor accessory|armor components]] he used for his work as prizes for special matches.

He never lost his components until [[Meetra Surik]] won all of his [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] after several matches, forcing Pato to wager his armor components. The Ithorian held no grudge against Surik and merely enjoyed playing against a skilled opponent.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The player can offer Pato Ado a chance to join the [[Khoonda Militia]] but he declines. He also has some pazaak cards to sell.

Unlike most pazaak players, Ado will gladly continue to play matches with the player after his components are won, without a wager.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
